creator: 林一二
title: linonetwo/preview-glass
cpl.title: $:/plugins/linonetwo/preview-glass
cpl.author: LinOnetwo
cpl.name: Hover Preview Glass
cpl.description: Modern link hover preview with glass effect
cpl.readme:
! About

Link hover preview plugin with glass effect. Complete rewrite of [[tobibeer/preview|https://tobibeer.github.io/tw5-plugins/#preview]].

Shows popup on link hover with:

* Content excerpt (first few lines)
* Backlinks (requires inverse-link-and-folder plugin)
* Metadata (modified, created, tags)

!! Features

* Glass effect with backdrop-filter
* Adapts to all themes via TiddlyWiki palette system
* Lightweight implementation using document-level event listeners
* Positioned near cursor
* Configurable exclusions for system/shadow/empty tiddlers
* 150ms hover delay to avoid accidental triggers
